g.text: Live: https://visionflow-clinical-copilot.onrender.com | API v2.1.0 | Stack: LangGraph | FastAPI | Next.js 15 | Groq/Ollama
IN: name, age, symptoms, laterality, VA, IOP, duration, comorbidities
LLM (Groq / OpenAI / Ollama) - Senior ophthalmology assessment
OUT | analysis (diagnosis, differential, workup, confidence %, ICD-10, guidelines, referral)
LLM + rule-based fallback - Triage nurse classification
No LLM - template with urgency-specific next steps
IN: all clinical fields + vitals + reports
OUT: summary, analysis, urgency, doctor_report, patient_education, icd10, confidence, referral,
pipeline_trace (6 steps), automation metrics, saved patient record with ID
Context: full patient record from DB
Same-day | Sudden vision loss | Retinal detachment | AACG
24-48 hours | Painful red eye | High IOP | New floaters
Standard follow-up | Presbyopia | Dry eye | Cataract review
